# webalati.tech

> A bilingual (English + Croatian) directory of 88 hand-tested AI tools across 11 categories. Updated weekly. All tools are evaluated for real-world usability, pricing, and features before being listed.

## What this site covers

webalati.tech is an independent AI tools directory for content creators, marketers, developers, and businesses. Every listed tool has been tested hands-on by the WebAlati editorial team. The site is available in English (/en/) and Croatian (/hr/).

## Key pages

- Homepage (EN): https://webalati.tech/en/
- Homepage (HR): https://webalati.tech/hr/
- AI Video Tools: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-video-tools.html
- AI Audio & Voice Tools: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-audio-tools.html
- AI Marketing Tools: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-marketing-tools.html
- AI Productivity Tools: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-productivity-tools.html
- AI Coding Tools: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-coding-tools.html
- AI Education Tools: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-education-tools.html
- AI Image & Design Tools: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-image-tools.html
- Earn Money with AI: https://webalati.tech/en/earn-money-with-ai.html
- AI Social Media Tools: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-social-media-tools.html
- AI Tools for Content Creators: https://webalati.tech/en/best-ai-tools-content-creators.html
- Blog (EN): https://webalati.tech/en/blogs/
- ElevenLabs vs Murf comparison: https://webalati.tech/en/compare/elevenlabs-vs-murf.html

## Notable tools covered

ElevenLabs, Syllaby, Opus Clip, Midjourney, ChatGPT, Claude, Runway ML, Canva AI, i10x, Moose, Kling AI, Klap, KreadoAI, Hedra, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Jasper, Copy.ai, Suno, Adobe Firefly, DALL-E 3, and 67 more.

## Categories

Video · Audio & Voice · Image & Design · Marketing · Productivity · Coding · Education · Entertainment · Earn Money · Social Media · Content Creators
